OmniIntegrationProcedure.description: Gets the person education records related to an applicant’s person account, and uses the data from the records to prefill the education details in the job application.
OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: GetDataToPrefillEducationDetails

omniProcessElements.name: GetPersonEducationRecords
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "RecruitmentGetPersonEducationRecords", "chainOnStep" : false, "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "ignoreCache" : false, "label" : "DataMapperExtractAction1", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "personAccountId", "sendJSONPath" : "personAccountId", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }
